data.title: RED: Write behavioral tests for ui-designer validate-review-output integration
data.description:
## Testing Mode
testing_mode: RED

## Description
Create a new test script with 3 behavioral tests that all FAIL before implementation. Tests exercise deterministic integration interfaces only — no grep-based content assertions on Markdown files.

Tests:
1. test_validate_lists_ui_designer: validate-review-output.sh --list-callers | grep -q ui-designer → exits non-zero (RED: not registered)
2. test_validate_accepts_ui_designer_review: create 4-perspective valid fixture (Product Management, Design Systems, Accessibility, Frontend Engineering), run validate-review-output.sh review-protocol /tmp/ui-designer-r2-fixture.json --caller ui-designer → exits non-zero (RED: unknown caller)
3. test_contract_schema_valid: check-contract-schemas.sh plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md → exits non-zero (RED: file absent)

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/skills/test-preplanning-ui-designer-dispatch.sh | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 3 tests emit FAIL when run before any other task completes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-preplanning-ui-designer-dispatch.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'FAIL' | grep -q 3
- [ ] Test script syntax is valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-preplanning-ui-designer-dispatch.sh
- [ ] Test script is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-preplanning-ui-designer-dispatch.sh

## Dependencies
None (root task)
